summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife premium SaaS UI system. All cinematic background, 3D glass panel, and interactive elements working perfectly across /login, /onboarding, and /dashboard pages.
passed_tests: Login page loads with cinematic background (construction site image)
Login panel has 3D perspective/tilt effect with glass material
Login branding 'TradeLife' and 'Built for trades' visible with glow effect
Email input works (can type and accepts input)
Password input works (can type and accepts input)
Forgot password link visible and styled correctly
Sign in button visible and clickable with blue gradient
Continue with Google button visible and clickable
Onboarding page loads with same cinematic background
Onboarding step indicator and Get Started button work
Business name input and trade type selection functional
Dashboard page loads with cinematic background (darker overlay)
Dashboard content (panels, data) readable over background
Background consistent across all pages (same login-bg.png image)
All interactive elements clickable and functional
